user.title: Connect to EARN-E P1 meter
user.description: No device was automatically discovered. Enter the IP address of your EARN-E energy monitor manually.

data_description.host: The local IP address of your EARN-E P1 meter (e.g. 192.168.1.100).

discovery_confirm.title: Discovered EARN-E P1 meter
discovery_confirm.description: An EARN-E P1 meter was found at **{host}**.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure EARN-E P1 meter
reconfigure.description: Update the IP address of your EARN-E energy monitor.

data_description.host: The new local IP address of your EARN-E P1 meter.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect — no data received from the device. Verify the IP address and that the EARN-E is powered on.

abort.already_configured: This EARN-E P1 meter is already configured.
